appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.description: Switch between light and dark mode.

reset.label: Reset to Default
reset.description: Reset all settings and data to defaults.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose whether the desktop uses a light or dark theme, or follows the system preference.
appearance.animationDescription: Controls the speed of window open/close animations (0.1s - 1.0s) must save to see changes.

font.title: Font
font.description: Changes the font across the entire desktop interface. Fonts must be downloaded before use.
font.downloadError: Font didn't download successfully. Try again with the correct name

reset.title: Reset to Default
reset.description: Reset all settings and data to their default values. This action cannot be undone.
reset.modalDescription: This will erase all your data and settings.

language.title: Language
language.description: Select your preferred language for the desktop interface.
